codeReview.summary: Implementation matches the feature contract: CI now exposes distinct fail-closed checks for lint, vitest, pytest, and playwright; local command wiring mirrors those layers through ci:* scripts and services manifest mappings; and mission port/environment assumptions (3100/3101) remain consistent with Playwright and service definitions.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit 756ec61. Changes correctly split CI gates by layer, preserve fail-closed semantics, align local/CI command matrix semantics, and keep the approved 3100/3101 environment contract. No blocking or non-blocking defects were identified for this feature scope.
